title: South China Sea / Spratlys, 2024
briefing: DEFCON 3. A PLAN carrier group has sortied from Hainan toward the Spratlys. A US CSG is steaming from Subic. CCG cutters have rammed a Philippine resupply vessel at Second Thomas Shoal. Both navies are now within strike range of every artificial island.
gdelt_query: Spratly OR "South China Sea" OR Scarborough OR "Second Thomas Shoal" OR PLAN carrier Hainan
opening_message: WOPR online. Theater: South China Sea / Spratlys. Awaiting strategic command.

win_conditions.disarm: Deconflict the Spratlys without a kinetic exchange.
win_conditions.mutual_assured_destruction: PLAN and US CSG lose a vessel in the same window.
